TEXT.citation: Wikipedia contributors. (2026). Atayal Wikipedia. Wikimedia Foundation. Retrieved 2026-06-09, from https://tay.wikipedia.org/
TEXT.BibTeX_citation: @misc{Wiki_tay, title = {Atayal Wikipedia}, author = {{Wikipedia contributors}}, year = {2026}, publisher = {Wikimedia Foundation}, url = {https://tay.wikipedia.org/}, urldate = {2026-06-09} }

S.FORM: alang Carapongay ga niya mki sku Tayto Keng atu Nakahama go, kwara sali buwan nya ga 33 buwan, 82 hi ku kwara s'uli tayan. s'uli tayan pinspngan Gyencumin ga 73% kyan ku 60 hi, binah ga, 'yat kahun sku pinspngan Gyencumin ga 27% kyan ku 22 hi nya. pinspung na linhuyan Gyencumin ga, Amis 62%, Bunun 1%, Tayan 2%, Puyuma 1%, Truku 2%. maki qu ngasal bziran, ngasal psatu tegami ru pqniqan iyu. rhzyal kki'an tay 'llaw na Carapongay hya' ga bsilung. tay 'zil na Carapongay hya' ga rgyax. tay mkyahu' na Carapongay hya' ga llyung. tay mkraya' na Carapongay hya' ga llyung. tay mkraya' na Carapongay hya' ga Ta'man. rekisi kayal kyokay qalang Carapongay ga ungat kyokay. hasisyo maki 1 hasisyo. ssquliq pinlpgan ppqbaqan pqwasan biru 'laqi' cikuy maki 1 pqwasan biru 'laqi' cikuy. tuqi 'san basu kisya' glgan spyangan na pinbahu Ubuy qqmayh
S.PHON: alaŋ ʦ~ʨarapoŋaj ɣa nija mki s~ɕku tajto keŋ atu nakaħama ɣo, kwara s~ɕali βuwan nja ɣa ** βuwan, ** ħi ku kwara s~ɕʔuli tajan. s~ɕʔuli tajan pins~ɕpŋan ɣjenʦ~ʨumin ɣa **% kjan ku ** ħi, βinaħ ɣa, ʔjat kaħun s~ɕku pins~ɕpŋan ɣjenʦ~ʨumin ɣa **% kjan ku ** ħi nja. pins~ɕpuŋ na linħujan ɣjenʦ~ʨumin ɣa, amis~ɕ **%, βunun *%, tajan *%, pujuma *%, truku *%. maki qu ŋas~ɕal βziran, ŋas~ɕal ps~ɕatu teɣami ru pqniqan iju. rħzjal kkiʔan taj ʔllaw na ʦ~ʨarapoŋaj ħjaʔ ɣa βs~ɕiluŋ. taj ʔzil na ʦ~ʨarapoŋaj ħjaʔ ɣa rɣjax. taj mkjaħuʔ na ʦ~ʨarapoŋaj ħjaʔ ɣa lljuŋ. taj mkrajaʔ na ʦ~ʨarapoŋaj ħjaʔ ɣa lljuŋ. taj mkrajaʔ na ʦ~ʨarapoŋaj ħjaʔ ɣa taʔman. rekis~ɕi kajal kjokaj qalaŋ ʦ~ʨarapoŋaj ɣa uŋat kjokaj. ħas~ɕis~ɕjo maki * ħas~ɕis~ɕjo. s~ɕs~ɕquliq pinlpɣan ppqβaqan pqwas~ɕan βiru ʔlaqiʔ ʦ~ʨikuj maki * pqwas~ɕan βiru ʔlaqiʔ ʦ~ʨikuj. tuqi ʔs~ɕan βas~ɕu kis~ɕjaʔ ɣlɣan s~ɕpjaŋan na pinβaħu uβuj qqmajħ
S.FORM: alang Carapongay ga niya mki sku Tayto Keng atu Nakahama go, kwara sali buwan nya ga 33 buwan, 82 hi ku kwara s'uli tayan. s'uli tayan pinspngan Gyencumin ga 73% kyan ku 60 hi, binah ga, 'yat kahun sku pinspngan Gyencumin ga 27% kyan ku 22 hi nya. pinspung na linhuyan Gyencumin ga, Amis 62%, Bunun 1%, Tayan 2%, Puyuma 1%, Truku 2%. maki qu ngasal bziran, ngasal psatu tegami ru pqniqan iyu. rhzyal kki'an tay 'llaw na Carapongay hya' ga bsilung. tay 'zil na Carapongay hya' ga rgyax. tay mkyahu' na Carapongay hya' ga llyung. tay mkraya' na Carapongay hya' ga llyung. tay mkraya' na Carapongay hya' ga Ta'man. rekisi kayal kyokay qalang Carapongay ga ungat kyokay. hasisyo maki 1 hasisyo. ssquliq pinlpgan ppqbaqan pqwasan biru 'laqi' cikuy maki 1 pqwasan biru 'laqi' cikuy. tuqi 'san basu kisya' glgan spyangan na pinbahu Ubuy qqmayh
S.PHON: alaŋ ʦ~ʨarapoŋaj ɣa nija mki s~ɕku tajto keŋ atu nakaħama ɣo, kwara s~ɕali βuwan nja ɣa ** βuwan, ** ħi ku kwara s~ɕʔuli tajan. s~ɕʔuli tajan pins~ɕpŋan ɣjenʦ~ʨumin ɣa **% kjan ku ** ħi, βinaħ ɣa, ʔjat kaħun s~ɕku pins~ɕpŋan ɣjenʦ~ʨumin ɣa **% kjan ku ** ħi nja. pins~ɕpuŋ na linħujan ɣjenʦ~ʨumin ɣa, amis~ɕ **%, βunun *%, tajan *%, pujuma *%, truku *%. maki qu ŋas~ɕal βziran, ŋas~ɕal ps~ɕatu teɣami ru pqniqan iju. rħzjal kkiʔan taj ʔllaw na ʦ~ʨarapoŋaj ħjaʔ ɣa βs~ɕiluŋ. taj ʔzil na ʦ~ʨarapoŋaj ħjaʔ ɣa rɣjax. taj mkjaħuʔ na ʦ~ʨarapoŋaj ħjaʔ ɣa lljuŋ. taj mkrajaʔ na ʦ~ʨarapoŋaj ħjaʔ ɣa lljuŋ. taj mkrajaʔ na ʦ~ʨarapoŋaj ħjaʔ ɣa taʔman. rekis~ɕi kajal kjokaj qalaŋ ʦ~ʨarapoŋaj ɣa uŋat kjokaj. ħas~ɕis~ɕjo maki * ħas~ɕis~ɕjo. s~ɕs~ɕquliq pinlpɣan ppqβaqan pqwas~ɕan βiru ʔlaqiʔ ʦ~ʨikuj maki * pqwas~ɕan βiru ʔlaqiʔ ʦ~ʨikuj. tuqi ʔs~ɕan βas~ɕu kis~ɕjaʔ ɣlɣan s~ɕpjaŋan na pinβaħu uβuj qqmajħ
